rows.description: Soluta Dno. Rectori, Scholaribus, et Officiariis
rows.notes: Adopted gpt-5-mini's description for 'Dno.' and accurate spelling of 'Officiariis', which matches the image better than 'Drs' from gemini-flash. Both correctly identified as a header with no monetary amounts.
rows.section_header: Soluta Dno. Rectori, Scholaribus, et Officiariis

rows.notes: Based on gpt-5-mini (row 2), identified as a distinct section header. Corrected 'Ad Testam' to 'Ad Festum' based on visual inspection. gemini-flash incorrectly combined this with the subsequent 'Stipendium' entry.

Visual inspection confirms gemini-flash (row 2) is correct; 'Stipendium' has no amount on its line. The amount 19/13/4 clearly belongs to the subsequent entry. gpt-5-mini (row 3) incorrectly assigned an amount to this line.
rows.english_description: Stipend payment at Christmas (recipient not specified on this line).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Stipend payment at Christmas; amount not specified in structured fields.

rows.notes: Combined correct description from gpt-5-mini (row 4) and correct amount (19/13/4) from gemini-flash (row 3). Both models exhibited an amount-description misalignment for this and preceding/succeeding rows.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment towards the augmentation for South Newington and Merton, amounting to £19 13s 4d.

rows.description: Francisco Milman Med. Bac. Scholari peregrinanti a festo Annunciationis 1773 ad eidem festum 1774
rows.notes: Amounts (6/13/4) and row_type confirmed by both. Adopted gemini-flash's description (row 18) as it accurately reflected 'Annunciationis' (capital A) and 'eidem' over gpt-5-mini's (row 19) lowercase and 'idem', despite gpt-5-mini noting textual ambiguity.
rows.english_description: Payment to Francisco Milman, M.B., a scholar travelling from the Annunciation 1773 to the same feast 1774.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Francisco Milman, M.B., a travelling scholar from Lady Day 1773 to Lady Day 1774, amounting to £6 13s 4d.

rows.notes: Full consensus from both extractors on row_type, blank description, and amounts (557/1/1). Visual verification confirms this is a page total, boxed and underlined.

Amounts (0/9/0) and row_type confirmed by both. Visually confirmed 'Owin's Fine' over gpt-5-mini's (row 22) 'King's Fine', adopting gemini-flash's description (row 21).
